bibliography.title: Bibliography
bibliography.subtitle: Choose a project to manage and check its bibliography.
bibliography.noProjectsDescription: Create a project first, then manage its bibliography here.
bibliography.possibleDuplicatesCount: {count, plural, one {# possible duplicate} other {# possible duplicates}}
bibliography.emptyDescription: Import a reference list or add sources one at a time to check for duplicates, outdated sources and formatting issues.

addReferenceDialog.title: Add a reference
addReferenceDialog.referencePlaceholder: Smith, J. (2020). Title of the paper. Journal Name.

importBibliographyDialog.title: Import bibliography
importBibliographyDialog.description: Paste references (one per line) or upload a DOCX, PDF or text file. Each reference will be checked for duplicates, outdated sources and formatting issues.
importBibliographyDialog.referencesPlaceholder:
Smith, J. (2020). Title of the paper. Journal Name.
Doe, A. (2019). Another title. Publisher.
importBibliographyDialog.successWithAnalysis: Imported and analyzed {count, plural, one {# reference} other {# references}}.
importBibliographyDialog.successWithoutAnalysis: Imported {count, plural, one {# reference} other {# references}}. AI analysis is unavailable.
